scripts.db:migrate:test: bun run deploy:ensure-d1:test && bun run deploy:config:test && bun tools/deploy/run-wrangler.ts d1 migrations apply DB --remote --config .wrangler/generated/test.jsonc
scripts.db:migrate:production: bun run deploy:ensure-d1:production && bun run deploy:config:production && bun tools/deploy/run-wrangler.ts d1 migrations apply DB --remote --config .wrangler/generated/production.jsonc
scripts.dev:inner: bun run db:local:guard && CI=1 wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --local --persist-to ${LOCAL_D1_STATE_ROOT} --config wrangler.jsonc && nuxt dev
scripts.deploy:worker:test: bun run deploy:ensure-d1:test && bun run deploy:ensure-r2:test && bun run deploy:config:test && bun tools/deploy/run-wrangler.ts deploy --config .wrangler/generated/test.jsonc
scripts.deploy:worker:production: bun run deploy:ensure-d1:production && bun run deploy:ensure-r2:production && bun run deploy:config:production && bun tools/deploy/run-wrangler.ts deploy --config .wrangler/generated/production.jsonc
scripts.deploy:test: bun run deploy:worker:test && bun run deploy:queue-consumers:test
scripts.deploy:production: bun run deploy:worker:production && bun run deploy:queue-consumers:production
scripts.test:bdd:inner: bun run db:local:guard && bun tests/bdd/bootstrap.ts && bddgen && playwright test --project chromium-bdd --project chromium-authenticated-bdd && bun tests/bdd/bootstrap.ts && playwright test --project chromium-authenticated-destructive-bdd --workers=1
scripts.test:all: bun run test:unit && bun run test:integration && bun run test:bdd
